articles.title: CopilotKit raises $27M to help devs deploy app-native AI agents
articles.description: The Seattle-based startup's Series A round was led by Glilot Capital, NFX and SignalFire, TechCrunch has exclusively learned.

articles.title: Space and Time rolls out virtual vaults for institutional onchain lending

articles.title: Binance changes weekend pricing for commodity TradFi futures
articles.description: Binance will shift to an orderbook-weighted pricing model for commodity perpetual futures during off-hours, potentially changing margin and liquidation behavior.

articles.title: Crypto.com’s high-rolling head of marketing to leave after almost six years
articles.description: Steven Kalifowitz will be moving on from his role as CMO, effective June 30, and will then continue on as advisor to the CEO.

articles.title: Coinbase cuts 14% of workforce, citing market slump and AI shift
articles.description: Brian Armstrong said Coinbase will flatten management layers and require leaders to work as “player-coaches” under the new structure.

articles.title: Bitcoin ‘supercycle’ or bear-market rally? BTC breaking $81K has traders at odds

articles.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: index jumps 1.3% as all constituents trade higher
articles.description: Internet Computer (ICP) rose 5.2% and Chainlink (LINK) gained 4% since Monday.

articles.title: State Street and Galaxy launch tokenized fund to bring cash management onchain
articles.description: The fund lets institutions earn yield on stablecoins while moving cash onchain with round-the-clock access.

articles.title: Europe should weigh tokenized SEPA payments, Bank of Italy official says
articles.description: The Bank of Italy’s deputy governor floated the evaluation of tokenized SEPA payments, as the ECB experiments with tokenized digital payment frameworks to avoid stablecoin competition.

articles.title: K Wave Media scraps massive bitcoin treasury plan to redirect $485 million to AI
articles.description: The Nasdaq-listed firm raised $500 million to invest in bitcoin. Less than a year later, it is chasing the market's current hot sector of AI.

articles.title: Amazon bets Nobel Prize-based dehumidification can cut its energy use
articles.description: Amazon will buy a new type of HVAC system for its commercial buildings to slash energy use.
